function: Primary LiDAR/IMU sensing unit for cave acquisition
connector_or_interface: Ethernet/data connector and dedicated DC power input, exact final connector to document
validation_required: Verify ROS2 driver, topics, timestamps, IMU orientation, DLIO parameters and point-cloud quality after any substitution.
notes: Main sensing unit for the HML-LiDAR workflow. Substitution changes the driver, topics, time synchronization and odometry parameterization.

function: Field acquisition computer for ROS2 bag recording
connector_or_interface: 5 V power input; Ethernet/USB interfaces depending on final wiring
validation_required: Verify CPU load, thermal stability, ROS2 bag recording duration and storage write speed.
notes: RAM size and operating system version should be documented for the stable release.

function: Stores ROS2 bag files during field acquisition
connector_or_interface: microSD or USB/SSD depending on acquisition configuration
validation_required: Run a full-duration recording test and verify no message loss or storage saturation.
notes: SSD is preferable for long acquisitions or high-rate data logging.

function: Mechanical support for the head/helmet-mounted LiDAR system
connector_or_interface: Mechanical mounting interface
validation_required: Verify that the mount does not compromise helmet safety and remains stable during walking, crawling and head rotation.
notes: The protective function of the helmet must not be reduced by the mount.

function: Holds the LiDAR/IMU rigidly on the helmet
connector_or_interface: Screws, brackets or custom mount geometry
validation_required: Check vibration, sensor orientation stability and absence of relative motion between helmet and sensor.
notes: Any change in mount geometry or sensor orientation must be documented and retested.

function: Secures cables and prevents snagging
connector_or_interface: Mechanical strain relief
validation_required: Inspect cable movement during field-like motion and narrow-passage simulation.
notes: Cave use requires cables to be short, secured and protected from abrasion.

function: Transports and protects battery and power components during field handling
connector_or_interface: Drawstring closure and reinforced eyelets
validation_required: Verify that sharp edges, exposed solder joints and battery terminals are separately protected inside the bag.
notes: Useful for transport, but not a substitute for a waterproof electronics enclosure.

function: Main field power source
connector_or_interface: DJI Matrice 100 / TB47D proprietary battery interface
validation_required: Verify battery state of health, runtime, voltage stability and safe mechanical retention.
notes: Battery originally designed for DJI Matrice-series systems and used here as the main energy source for the HML-LiDAR prototype.

function: Mechanical and electrical interface between TB47D battery and prototype wiring
connector_or_interface: DJI Matrice 100 / TB47D proprietary connector
validation_required: Verify polarity, mechanical lock, output voltage and absence of intermittent connection under movement.
notes: Marked Matrice 100 on the photographed component.

function: Charges TB47D battery outside the cave
connector_or_interface: DJI charger-to-battery connector
validation_required: Use only in dry, controlled conditions; verify compatibility with TB47D battery.
notes: Charging component only; not part of the helmet-mounted system during acquisition.

function: Regulates battery voltage to the LiDAR-side supply used in the prototype
connector_or_interface: Soldered input/output pads; red/black DC power leads; final LiDAR connector to document
validation_required: Measure output voltage and polarity with no load and under load before connecting the LiDAR; check thermal behavior.
notes: The final LiDAR supply voltage and connector polarity must be explicitly documented in the wiring diagram.

function: Regulates battery voltage to 5 V for the Raspberry Pi
connector_or_interface: Soldered 5 V and GND pads; final Raspberry Pi power connector to document
validation_required: Measure 5 V output and polarity under realistic Raspberry Pi load; check voltage drop during recording.
notes: Raspberry Pi requires a stable 5 V supply with adequate current margin.

function: Manual recording control for the RPi subsystem
validation_required: Verify current rating, contact stability and protection against accidental activation.
notes: Should be placed where it can be reached but not accidentally toggled in narrow passages.

function: Detachable DC connection within the prototype power wiring
connector_or_interface: Cylindrical DC connector; diameter and polarity to measure
validation_required: Measure connector diameter, center polarity and voltage before duplication.
notes: Do not assume polarity from appearance; document with an annotated photo.

function: Carries LiDAR data to acquisition computer or interface
connector_or_interface: Final connector type to document
validation_required: Verify ROS2 topic stability and absence of intermittent connection during movement.
notes: Cable routing must reduce snagging risk.

function: Runs ROS2 bag replay, DLIO processing, PCD export and VisualTopo conversion
connector_or_interface: Docker, filesystem mounts, optional Foxglove port
validation_required: Verify Docker, ROS2 Humble, DLIO, Python dependencies and script paths.
notes: Version details should be recorded in the technical manual and release notes.

validation_required: Confirm 5 V and GND polarity; test under Raspberry Pi load before field use.
